system.description:
Roll +Body when you try to struggle against someone or something.

10+: You struggle successfully, taking damage. Choose two.

7-9: Choose one: shrug off the damage; take something from them; surprise them; frighten them.

results.success: You struggle successfully, taking damage. Choose two.
results.partial: Choose one: shrug off the damage; take something from them; surprise them; frighten them.
